items.text: The GeoFence_singleton component shall establish a recursive variable t with an initial value of 0.1
items.fragment: The GeoFence_singleton component shall establish a recursive variable t with an initial value of 0.1
items.requirement_fragment: The GeoFence_singleton component shall establish a recursive variable t with an initial value of 0.1

items.text: The GeoFence_singleton component shall declare the variable distanceFromFence
items.fragment: The GeoFence_singleton component shall declare the variable distanceFromFence
items.requirement_fragment: The GeoFence_singleton component shall declare the variable distanceFromFence

items.text: The GeoFence_singleton component shall calculate distanceFromFence by calling the circleLinearization function from the geofence_nodes library with the variable t as a parameter
items.fragment: The GeoFence_singleton component shall calculate distanceFromFence by calling the circleLinearization function from the geofence_nodes library with the variable t as a parameter
items.requirement_fragment: The GeoFence_singleton component shall calculate distanceFromFence by calling the circleLinearization function from the geofence_nodes library with the variable t as a parameter

items.text: The GeoFence_singleton component shall ensure that after the time value exceeds the recovery time of 1.7, the value of distanceFromFence must be greater than the value of the previous time step's distanceFromFence
items.fragment: The GeoFence_singleton component shall ensure that after the time value exceeds the recovery time of 1.7, the value of distanceFromFence must be greater than the value of the previous time step's distanceFromFence
items.requirement_fragment: The GeoFence_singleton component shall ensure that after the time value exceeds the recovery time of 1.7, the value of distanceFromFence must be greater than the value of the previous time step's distanceFromFence

items.text: The system failure time shall be set to 9.5
items.fragment: The system failure time shall be set to 9.5
